title: Baker & Salt® 20cm Sandwich Tin Cake Baking - Non-Stick, Oven & Dishwasher Safe
features: Internal dimensions: 20.5cm x 20.5cm x 3.5cm,Double non-stick coating,Oven safe up to 230°C
description: The Baker & Salt Non-Stick Sandwich Tin is part of the Baker & Salt Non-Stick collection - a range of bakeware that boasts the following benefits: Double non-stick coating for excellent release.Both freezer safe and dishwasher safe.Oven safe up to 230°C.Baker & Salt Non-Stick Sandwich Tin is perfect for baking a traditional Victoria Sponge or other delicious cake recipes such as lemon or chocolate sponge.Internal dimensions: 20.5cm x 20.5cm x 3.5cm.Made in Britain.
